        .pull_up_en = GPIO_PULLUP_DISABLE,
        .pull_down_en = GPIO_PULLDOWN_DISABLE,
        .intr_type = GPIO_INTR_DISABLE,
    };
    
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(gpio_config(&gpio_conf));
    
    // Initialize reference input pin if enabled
    if (enable_ref_input) {
        gpio_conf.pin_bit_mask = (1ULL << ref_input_pin);
        gpio_conf.mode = GPIO_MODE_INPUT;
        ESP_ERROR_CHECK(gpio_config(&gpio_conf));
    }

    // Power up the codec
    uint8_t reg_data = 0x00;
    
    // Reset codec
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_master_write_to_device(i2c_port, i2c_addr, &reg_data, 1, 1000 / portTICK_PERIOD_MS));
    
    // Configure DAC settings
    reg_data = 0x00; // Set default value
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_master_write_to_device(i2c_port, i2c_addr, &reg_data, 1, 1000 / portTICK_PERIOD_MS));
    
    // Configure ADC settings
    reg_data = 0x00; // Set default value
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_master_write_to_device(i2c_port, i2c_addr, &reg_data, 1, 1000 / portTICK_PERIOD_MS));
    
    // Configure sample rate
    switch(sample_rate) {
        case 8000:
            reg_data = 0x00; // 8kHz
            break;
        case 16000:
            reg_data = 0x01; // 16kHz

        case 32000:

        case 44100:

            break;

            reg_data = 0x04; // 48kHz

        default:

            break;
    }
    
    // Apply sample rate configuration
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_master_write_to_device(i2c_port, i2c_addr, &reg_data, 1, 1000 / portTICK_PERIOD_MS));
    
    // Configure channels
    if (channels == 1) {
        reg_data = 0x01; // Mono mode
    } else {
        reg_data = 0x00; // Stereo mode
    }
    
    // Apply channel configuration

- Generated code assumes a higher-level C++ client abstraction (`m_websocketClient->Connect(config)`), which simplifies usage but diverges from expected interfaces.
- Function signature matches, but internal method calls and control flow patterns (e.g., early returns after failures) vary widely.

In terms of functional completeness, major omissions include:

- Not setting custom HTTP headers beyond Authorization and Content-Type; missing Device-Id, Client-Id, Protocol-Version.
- Absence of disconnection callback registration.
- No integration with system info utilities like MAC address retrieval.
- No timeout handling when expecting server responses.
- Callbacks for audio stream packets and JSON messages are either missing or assumed to exist elsewhere.
- Critical version negotiation behavior based on runtime settings is lost.

Overall, while conceptually aligned at a very coarse level, the generated implementation lacks fidelity to both semantics and structure of the reference solution.
